extraction.one_line_summary: LAFAY Victor attacked at 1km out on the right side, held off VAN AERT's closing sprint by timing it when Jumbo-Visma hesitated after closing previous moves.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma hesitated after repeatedly closing attacks, creating window that LAFAY exploited at precisely 1km with right-side acceleration.
UAE controlled with POGACAR himself coming to front to neutralize moves final 2km, revealing proactive defense of YATES yellow.
Intermediate sprint saw WELLSFORD beat PHILIPSEN and PEDERSEN in contested finish, indicating sprinter hierarchy and willingness to spend matches mid-stage.

rider_signals.LAFAY Victor: positive: Second career win ever, attacked when not obvious choice, showed sustained power over 450m against closing field
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: Jumped too late after his team closed multiple moves, indecision costly despite having legs
rider_signals.POGACHAR Tadej: positive: Personally led chase work in final 2km to protect teammate YATES's yellow, unusual domestique role signals UAE team commitment
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: neutral: Third wheel positioning at intermediate sprint but couldn't convert, contested points aggressively
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: Completely shut out at intermediate sprint positioning, chasing green jersey ineffectively
